This is a testharness.js-based test.
Harness Error. harness_status.status = 1 , harness_status.message = Unhandled rejection: Failed to execute 'exportToGPU' on 'MLContext': MLContext::exportToGPU is not supported.
Found 11 FAIL, 0 TIMEOUT, 0 NOTRUN.

  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "NotSupportedError: Failed to execute 'exportToGPU' on 'MLContext': MLContext::exportToGPU is not supported."

  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "NotSupportedError: Failed to execute 'exportToGPU' on 'MLContext': MLContext::exportToGPU is not supported."

  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "NotSupportedError: Failed to execute 'exportToGPU' on 'MLContext': MLContext::exportToGPU is not supported."
[FAIL] interop / export then destroy tensor
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "NotSupportedError: Failed to execute 'exportToGPU' on 'MLContext': MLContext::exportToGPU is not supported."
[FAIL] interop / write tensor after export
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "NotSupportedError: Failed to execute 'exportToGPU' on 'MLContext': MLContext::exportToGPU is not supported."
[FAIL] interop / export twice
  promise_rejects_js: function "function() { throw e; }" threw object "NotSupportedError: Failed to execute 'exportToGPU' on 'MLContext': MLContext::exportToGPU is not supported." ("NotSupportedError") expected instance of function "function TypeError() { [native code] }" ("TypeError")
[FAIL] interop / dispatch gpu twice

[FAIL] interop / dispatch from webgpu then webnn
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "NotSupportedError: Failed to execute 'exportToGPU' on 'MLContext': MLContext::exportToGPU is not supported."
[FAIL] interop / destroy context after export
